title: Witches' Well
overview: While travelling in Edinburgh to research her book on Scottish Witch trials, a best-selling Horror writer is hounded by both a stalker and a potentially paranormal threat, challenging her skepticism of the otherworldly in this suspenseful Found Footage horror film
